ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_stock_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price for the stock on the date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price reached during the trading session */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price reached during the trading session */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the date */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the daily stock data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_stock_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_stock_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the historical data range */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the historical data range */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Metric used for performance evaluation (e.g., return, volatility) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_stock_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric calculated */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the calculated metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_analysis_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_stocks" (
  "watchlist_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist-stock association */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance summary, technical analysis) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the stored report */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, XML) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price drop) */,
  "trigger_value" REAL /* Value that triggers the alert */,
  "triggered" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been triggered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of trading */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of trading */,
  "market_status" TEXT /* Status of the market (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the price change */,
  "old_price" REAL /* Price before the change */,
  "new_price" REAL /* Price after the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
